raw_text: Pfizer acquired Seagen in 2023.
Merck entered into a license agreement with Moderna for mRNA technology.
Regeneron and Sanofi jointly developed an antibody platform and co-filed a patent.
CSL Behring collaborated with Takeda on plasma-derived therapy research.
Bristol Myers Squibb purchased Karuna Therapeutics in a strategic acquisition.
AbbVie filed patent with Genmab for a bispecific antibody invention.
AstraZeneca partnered with Daiichi Sankyo to co-develop oncology therapies.
Novartis worked with Alnylam on RNA interference delivery systems.
10X GENOMICS INC acquired a small diagnostics startup.
10X GENOMICS BV entered into a collaboration with BioNTech.
10X GENOMICS SWEDEN AB licensed imaging technology from NanoString.
CSL Behring GmbH developed a plasma therapy alongside CSL Behring Inc.
Pfizer Inc. acquired Seagen, according to the filing.
PFIZER acquired SEAGEN in a merger transaction.
Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and Sanofi co-assigned a patent family.
BMS collaborated with 2seventy bio on cell therapy programs.
Moderna, Inc.   entered into a license agreement with Vertex Pharmaceuticals.
Gilead Sciences, Inc. acquired   CymaBay Therapeutics.
argenx SE co-filed a patent with Johnson & Johnson.
bluebird bio partnered with Bristol-Myers Squibb in early studies.
Sarepta Therapeutics merged with Example Rare Disease Co.
CRISPR Therapeutics collaborated with Vertex Pharmaceuticals on gene editing.

Pfizer acquired Seagen in 2023. The deal expanded Pfizer's oncology portfolio.
Merck licensed technology from Moderna. Later, Merck collaborated with BioNTech on a separate vaccine effort.
AbbVie filed patent with Genmab. In a separate application, AbbVie worked with Calico.
Novartis collaborated with Alnylam on siRNA delivery. Novartis also worked with Intellia on genome editing.
CSL Behring and CSL Behring GmbH were both referenced in the transaction summary.
10X Genomics Sweden AB and 10X Genomics BV were both mentioned in the filing.
J&J worked with Johnson and Johnson Innovative Medicine on an antibody study.
Regeneron and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. appear as co-assignees in related filings.
Eli Lilly acquired POINT Biopharma to strengthen its radiopharmaceutical portfolio.
Roche entered into a collaboration with Recursion Pharmaceuticals.
Takeda worked with Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals on RNAi therapeutics.
Amgen co-filed a patent with Generate Biomedicines.
Biogen licensed a neurodegeneration program from Stoke Therapeutics.
GSK partnered with CureVac on next-generation mRNA vaccines.
Johnson & Johnson acquired Shockwave Medical.
Novo Nordisk filed patent with Valo Health on computational drug discovery.
Acme Bio collaborated with Beta Pharma.
Omega Therapeutics acquired ExampleCo.
BioNTech entered into a collaboration with Genentech.
Sanofi worked with Regeneron on immunology programs.
"Moderna" acquired 'Example Vaccine Co'.
